message:
chore: close bd-iuvb.17.10.3, bd-iuvb.17.13.8, bd-iuvb.17.9.3, bd-iuvb.17.12

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1152,10 +1152,10 @@
 {"id":"bd-iuvb.17.10","title":"Mouse/Shortcuts Pass: Visuals screens","description":"Purpose
- Track mouse-first + shortcut-rich upgrades for Visuals-category screens.

Included Screens
- Data Viz
- Table Theme Gallery
- Mermaid Showcase
- Mermaid Mega Showcase
- Visual Effects
- Theme Studio
- Snapshot Player (Time Travel Studio)

Visuals Interaction Themes
- Mouse for pan/zoom/inspect where meaningful (diagrams, charts).
- Wheel adjusts scale or scrolls within the appropriate panel, never 'randomly'.
- Keyboard shortcuts trigger parameter sweeps, overlays, and reset-to-deterministic-state.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-02-06T01:47:54.931165079Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-06T01:47:54.931165079Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo-showcase","mouse","shortcuts","visuals"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-iuvb.17.10","depends_on_id":"bd-iuvb.17","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T01:47:54.931165079Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-iuvb.17.10.1","title":"Data Viz: click-to-toggle series + mouse inspect + shortcuts","description":"Background
- DataViz is a dense visuals screen; it should support mouse inspection and fast toggles.

Goal
- Make charts feel interactive: click legends, hover points, wheel scroll/zoom where appropriate.

Mouse Interactions
- Hover a chart point shows tooltip (in status hint or overlay).
- Click legend toggles series visibility.
- Wheel adjusts zoom scale or scrolls within the selected chart panel (consistent rule).

Keyboard Shortcuts (examples)
- `L`: toggle legend.
- `Z`: toggle zoom mode.
- `R`: reset view.

Acceptance Criteria
- Interactions are deterministic (same inputs -> same tooltip/selection).
- At least 3-5 shortcuts are available and discoverable.

Key References
- `crates/ftui-demo-showcase/src/screens/data_viz.rs`","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"SilentFinch","created_at":"2026-02-06T01:49:40.661409127Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-06T18:33:30.787985583Z","closed_at":"2026-02-06T18:33:30.477837277Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["data-viz","demo-showcase","mouse","shortcuts"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-iuvb.17.10.1","depends_on_id":"bd-iuvb.17.10","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T01:49:40.661409127Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-iuvb.17.10.1","depends_on_id":"bd-iuvb.17.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T01:49:40.661409127Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-iuvb.17.10.1","depends_on_id":"bd-iuvb.17.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T01:49:40.661409127Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-iuvb.17.10.1","depends_on_id":"bd-iuvb.17.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T01:49:40.661409127Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":865,"issue_id":"bd-iuvb.17.10.1","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"SilentFinch verified: mouse handling, keybindings, hit-testing all implemented. Tests pass. Closing.","created_at":"2026-02-06T18:33:30Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-iuvb.17.10.2","title":"Table Theme Gallery: click-to-select preset + scroll + compare shortcuts","description":"Background
- TableThemeGallery is a perfect 'click around and compare' screen.

Goal
- Make theme selection and comparison mouse-first, and add shortcuts for rapid cycling.

Mouse Interactions
- Hover highlights a preset tile.
- Click selects preset.
- Wheel scrolls preset list and/or adjusts animation phase if present.

Keyboard Shortcuts (examples)
- `J/K`: next/prev preset.
- `Space`: pause/resume theme animation (if applicable).
- `C`: toggle comparison layout.

Acceptance Criteria
- Preset selection is obvious with hover/click.
- Snapshot includes selected preset state.

Key References

Closing.","created_at":"2026-02-06T18:36:39Z"}]}
-{"id":"bd-iuvb.17.10.3","title":"Mermaid Showcase: mouse interactions for controls + diagram inspection","description":"Background
- MermaidShowcase already has rich keyboard controls, but mouse support should match expectations: click tabs, click samples, scroll panels.

Goal
- Add mouse-driven selection and inspection across the Mermaid showcase UI.

Mouse Interactions
- Click sample list entries.
- Wheel scrolls sample list and/or output pane depending on hover.
- If diagram supports hit regions: hover highlights node/edge; click selects.

Keyboard Shortcuts
- Ensure existing shortcuts are surfaced, and add a small number of high-signal ones (reset, toggle overlays, toggle glyph mode).

Acceptance Criteria
- Mouse-only exploration is viable for sample switching and scrolling.
- No regression in determinism/snapshots.

Coordination
- This task should coordinate with the Mermaid showcase epics (`bd-2nkmi`, `bd-309ob`) but focuses on UX wiring, not layout algorithms.

Key References

 {"id":"bd-iuvb.17.10.4","title":"Mermaid Mega Showcase: mouse-first control surface + diagram hit testing","description":"Background
- MermaidMegaShowcase is the over-the-top interactive lab screen. It should be *extremely* mouse-friendly.

Goal
- Ensure the mega screen's control surface (knobs, toggles, sample selection, overlays) is fully operable by mouse and has rich shortcuts.

Mouse Interactions
- Click any toggle/knob.
- Drag sliders where present.
- Wheel scrolls the control panel or diagram pane depending on hover.
- Diagram hit testing: hover highlights; click selects; drag pans (if supported).

Keyboard Shortcuts
- Add consistent keys for:
  - sample next/prev
  - toggle overlays
  - start/stop auto-run
  - reset state deterministically

Acceptance Criteria
- Mega screen feels like a control panel: nothing important is keyboard-only.
- Interactions do not regress performance; mouse move is coalesced.

Coordination
- Coordinate with the mega screen epic `bd-3oaig` (this task focuses on mouse/shortcut UX wiring).

Key References
- `crates/ftui-demo-showcase/src/screens/mermaid_mega_showcase.rs`","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T01:49:41.661205626Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-06T19:13:24.301989772Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo-showcase","mega","mermaid","mouse","shortcuts"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-iuvb.17.10.4","depends_on_id":"bd-iuvb.17.10","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T01:49:41.661205626Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-iuvb.17.10.4","depends_on_id":"bd-iuvb.17.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T01:49:41.661205626Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-iuvb.17.10.4","depends_on_id":"bd-iuvb.17.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T01:49:41.661205626Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-iuvb.17.10.4","depends_on_id":"bd-iuvb.17.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T01:49:41.661205626Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":898,"issue_id":"bd-iuvb.17.10.4","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"CopperHawk claiming. Adding mouse interactions, diagram hit testing, and keyboard shortcuts to mermaid_mega_showcase.rs.","created_at":"2026-02-06T19:13:24Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-iuvb.17.10.5","title":"Visual Effects: mouse controls for anchors/params + shortcut presets","description":"Background
- VisualEffects is a 'wow' screen. Mouse should control something immediate (anchor, look, parameter).

Goal
- Add obvious mouse controls (move/drag) and shortcuts for effect presets.

Mouse Interactions
- Mouse move updates an anchor or inspection point (already used in some harnesses).
- Drag adjusts one key parameter (e.g., intensity) with deterministic step.
- Wheel cycles effects or adjusts a focused parameter.

Keyboard Shortcuts (examples)
- `N/P`: next/prev effect.
- `Space`: pause/resume animation.
- `R`: reset deterministic seed.

Acceptance Criteria
- Mouse interaction produces visible effect and is deterministic under fixed seed/time.

Key References
- `crates/ftui-demo-showcase/src/screens/visual_effects.rs`","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"SilentFinch","created_at":"2026-02-06T01:49:41.973988659Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-06T18:36:38.406121353Z","closed_at":"2026-02-06T18:36:38.105733279Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo-showcase","mouse","shortcuts","vfx"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-iuvb.17.10.5","depends_on_id":"bd-iuvb.17.10","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T01:49:41.973988659Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-iuvb.17.10.5","depends_on_id":"bd-iuvb.17.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T01:49:41.973988659Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-iuvb.17.10.5","depends_on_id":"bd-iuvb.17.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T01:49:41.973988659Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-iuvb.17.10.5","depends_on_id":"bd-iuvb.17.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T01:49:41.973988659Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":873,"issue_id":"bd-iuvb.17.10.5","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"SilentFinch verified: mouse handling, keybindings, hit-testing implemented. 160+ lib tests pass. Closing.","created_at":"2026-02-06T18:36:38Z"}]}
-{"id":"bd-iuvb.17.10.6","title":"Theme Studio: click/drag palette editing + shortcut toggles","description":"Background
- ThemeStudio should feel like a mini design tool.

Goal
- Make palette editing mouse-first (click swatches, drag sliders) with shortcuts for rapid toggles.

Mouse Interactions
- Click swatch selects color.
- Drag sliders adjusts channels deterministically.
- Wheel nudges selected channel or scrolls panel.

Keyboard Shortcuts (examples)
- `Tab`: next field.
- `C`: copy/paste color (demo-local).
- `R`: reset to preset.

Acceptance Criteria
- Mouse-only palette edits are viable.
- Help overlay documents actions.

 {"id":"bd-iuvb.17.10.7","title":"Snapshot Player: mouse scrubbing + click-to-jump + shortcuts","description":"Background
- SnapshotPlayer (Time Travel Studio) is one of the 'best stuff' screens.

Goal
- Make time travel controls mouse-first: click to jump, drag to scrub, wheel to step.

Mouse Interactions
- Click timeline to jump to frame.
- Drag timeline thumb to scrub.
- Wheel steps frame-by-frame when hovered.

Keyboard Shortcuts (examples)
- `Space`: play/pause.
- `←/→`: prev/next frame.
- `A/B`: toggle comparison modes.
- `R`: reset session.

Acceptance Criteria
- Scrubbing is deterministic and does not flicker.
- Snapshot tests cover a non-zero frame selection state.

Key References
- `crates/ftui-demo-showcase/src/screens/snapshot_player.rs`","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"HazyRaven","created_at":"2026-02-06T01:49:42.582303095Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-06T19:10:48.170645080Z","closed_at":"2026-02-06T19:10:48.170622097Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo-showcase","mouse","shortcuts","time-travel"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-iuvb.17.10.7","depends_on_id":"bd-iuvb.17.10","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T01:49:42.582303095Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-iuvb.17.10.7","depends_on_id":"bd-iuvb.17.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T01:49:42.582303095Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-iuvb.17.10.7","depends_on_id":"bd-iuvb.17.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T01:49:42.582303095Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-iuvb.17.10.7","depends_on_id":"bd-iuvb.17.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T01:49:42.582303095Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":889,"issue_id":"bd-iuvb.17.10.7","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"SilentFinch claiming. Starting mouse scrubbing + click-to-jump for Snapshot Player.","created_at":"2026-02-06T19:01:56Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-iuvb.17.11","title":"Mouse/Shortcuts Pass: Interaction screens","description":"Purpose
- Track mouse-first + shortcut-rich upgrades for Interaction-category screens.

Included Screens
- Forms & Input
- File Browser
- Macro Recorder
- Notifications
- Mouse Playground
- Form Validation
- Command Palette Evidence Lab
- Hyperlink Playground
- Kanban Board

Interaction Themes
- Click-to-focus and click-to-activate are primary.
- Wheel scrolls lists/panes under pointer.
- Drag-drop and selection gestures work where expected.
- Keyboard shortcuts still offer full control for non-mouse users.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-02-06T01:47:55.221357072Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-06T01:47:55.221357072Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo-showcase","interaction","mouse","shortcuts"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-iuvb.17.11","depends_on_id":"bd-iuvb.17","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T01:47:55.221357072Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-iuvb.17.11.1","title":"Forms & Input: click-to-focus fields + mouse wheel + shortcuts","description":"Background
- Forms are one of the most common interaction patterns. This screen should feel like a real UI.

Goal
- Make all controls operable with mouse and provide shortcuts for power navigation.

Mouse Interactions
- Click to focus a field.
- Click toggles and buttons to activate.
- Wheel scrolls the form when content overflows.

Keyboard Shortcuts (examples)
- `Tab`/`Shift+Tab`: next/prev control.
- `Enter`: activate primary action.
- `Ctrl+R`: reset form state.

Acceptance Criteria
- Focus is consistent between mouse and keyboard.
- Help overlay lists interaction keys.
